texto: You regard us here neither as thieves nor as robbers. Today, as in the time of Pilate, Christ the Savior is accused. Once again there is mocking and scorn, slander and noisy jubilance. But he remains yet, and his glance embraces sinners with unending compassion.
autor: Georgi Petrovich Vins-A Russian Baptist pastor
explicacao: Citação de Georgi Petrovich Vins-A Russian Baptist pastor sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “You regard us here neither as thieves nor as robbers.
